column1: ### Supplementary Table 13 — Cross-panel sample-overlap correlation (bivariate LD-score-regression intercepts) and correlation-aware p by rho

Panel A. Normalized LDSC genetic-covariance intercept matrix (cov2cor of the GenomicSEM I matrix) = exposure-side sample-overlap correlation among the four mtDNA-CN panels. Mean off-diagonal 0.487 (range 0.310-0.857). The two Gupta panels (identical 155,998 individuals) are near-redundant (0.857); the two UK-Biobank-heavy panels (Longchamps, Chong) correlate 0.740. Genetic correlations among panels were 0.74-0.97 (same trait).

Panel B. Correlation-aware p-value per outcome at the LDSC-derived rho=0.49, the primary rho=0.70, and rho=0.90 (computed by scaling the pipeline correlation-aware standard error; reproduces Supplementary Table 12 at rho=0.55/0.70/0.90). Point estimates (corr_beta) are unchanged by rho.
